identity.canonical_title: Numerical Recipe (Method-of-Lines / Split-Step for TDGL + Acoustic PDE): γ_a

theory.canonical_statement: 1. Spatial grid: 2D domain (thin metamaterial sheet) or 3D for full enclosure. Use pseudospectral in periodic directions + finite differences in radius. Grid resolution should resolve \(\xi\). 2. Time integrator: implicit-explicit RK (IMEX) for stiff diffusion + nonlinear terms, or ETDRK4 for accuracy. 3. Solve coupled system: - update \(\Psi\) via TDGL with current \(p(t,\mathbf{x})\); - update \(\Phi_a\) via damped wave (using explicit schemes with CFL condition); - incorporate Josephson phase if junction network included via coupled ODEs. 4. Diagnostics per time step: - \(|\Psi(\mathbf{x},t)|\), \(\arg\Psi\), supercurrent \(\mathbf{J}\); - winding numbers on small plaquettes; - spectral content (FFT) in angular direction to detect J₆ or chosen Bessel harmonics; - energy exchange: compute \(\Delta\mathcal{F}\), acoustic energy. 5. Parameter sweep: vary \(p_0\), \(\Delta f\), coupling \(g\), and damping \(\gamma_a\) to find bifurcation thresholds.
